compiled_state.title: CI: test-merge-conflict-regression.sh fails with 2 test failures in Hook Tests job
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: CI Hook Tests job fails on test-merge-conflict-regression.sh with 9 pass / 2 fail. Observed in run 24226145253. Pre-existing failure at session start.

comments.body: Fix: compute-diff-hash.sh cache key now includes both mtime AND file size (mtime+size) to prevent second-resolution collisions when two git add ops happen within the same second. Tests: 11 pass / 0 fail (was 9/2).
comments.author: Test
